message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "User" as User

participant "SearchWindowUI" as SearchWindowUI
participant "SearchOnAnotherInstanceController" as SearchOnAnotherInstanceController
participant "NetworkFactory" as NetworkFactory
participant "UDP_ClientImpl" as UDP_ClientImpl
participant "Thread" as Thread
participant "TCP_ClientImpl" as TCP_ClientImpl
participant "SpreadCheet" as SpreadCheet
participant "UDP_ClientImpl_03" as UDP_ClientImpl_03
participant "TCP_ClientImpl_03" as TCP_ClientImpl_03
participant "SearchWindowController" as SearchWindowController

User -> SearchWindowUI: start searching instances
activate SearchWindowUI
SearchWindowUI -> SearchOnAnotherInstanceController: create(address)
activate SearchOnAnotherInstanceController
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> NetworkFactory: Obj = getUDPClientImpl(availableInstances)
activate NetworkFactory
NetworkFactory -> UDP_ClientImpl_03: create()
activate UDP_ClientImpl_03
UDP_ClientImpl_03 -> Thread: create(obj)
activate Thread
Thread -> Thread: start()
Thread -> Thread: join()
deactivate Thread
deactivate UDP_ClientImpl_03
deactivate NetworkFactory
SearchWindowUI -> SearchOnAnotherInstanceController: checkIfIsAvailable()
activate SearchOnAnotherInstanceController
SearchOnAnotherInstanceController -> NetworkFactory: getInfo(destination)
activate NetworkFactory
NetworkFactory -> TCP_ClientImpl_03: create()
activate TCP_ClientImpl_03
TCP_ClientImpl_03 -> Thread: create(Object)
activate Thread
Thread -> Thread: start()
Thread -> TCP_ClientImpl_03: getInfo()
activate TCP_ClientImpl_03
TCP_ClientImpl_03 -> SpreadCheet: getInfo()
activate SpreadCheet
SpreadCheet -> Thread: join()
deactivate Thread
deactivate SpreadCheet
deactivate TCP_ClientImpl_03
deactivate NetworkFactory
deactivate SearchOnAnotherInstanceController
deactivate SearchWindowUI

@enduml
```
